theme_and_archetype.description: An elegant, spiritual, and high-end Islamic application relying on rich colors (#355070 for day, #2D2438 for night), gold/copper accents, and premium typography. The design must feel reverent, calm, and accessible with full RTL support.

global_rules.accessibility: High contrast ratio for Arabic script, touch targets minimum 48px, screen-reader friendly attributes, and specific ARIA labels for audio controls.

scales.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-cairo font-bold leading-tight tracking-normal
scales.dhikr_text: text-2xl md:text-3xl font-amiri leading-loose text-center md:text-right

typography.alignment: Right-aligned by default due to RTL, except for specific Dhikr text which can be centered for emphasis.

welcome_screen.visuals: Use 'geometric_background_day' or 'night' as full-screen background with a dark overlay (bg-black/40).
welcome_screen.elements: Large app title 'أذكاري', elegant subtitle, and a prominent 'Download Audio (~60MB)' button.
welcome_screen.button_style: bg-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#B87333] text-black font-cairo font-bold rounded-full py-4 px-8 shadow-lg transition-transform hover:scale-105

bottom_navigation.style: bg-black/20 border-t border-white/10. Active item highlighted with gold text and an indicator dot.
bottom_navigation.icons: Use lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react (e.g., Home, Book, Clock, Settings).

dhikr_card.layout: Relative container, p-6 or p-8, rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl.
dhikr_card.surface: Solid background matching theme's surface color or subtle glass. 1px border of white/10.
dhikr_card.content: Amiri font for Arabic script, Audio Player (Play/Pause, Progress bar), Counter button at bottom.
dhikr_card.counter_button: Large circular or pill-shaped button. Starts with target count. Shows progress (e.g., 1/3). When completed, transitions to a success state (vibrates, turns gold or green).

digital_tasbih.layout: Central focal point. Use 'digital_tasbih' image as visual reference or backdrop.
digital_tasbih.interaction: Massive central tap area. Haptic feedback (if possible in web environment, simulate with visual pulse).
digital_tasbih.visual_feedback: On every tap, the counter number briefly scales up (scale-110) and returns.

popup_modal.visuals: Prophet Mosque Madinah image at the top half, dua text in the bottom half. Rounded-2xl, soft shadow-2xl.

spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous padding: p-4 to p-6 for mobile cards to let the Arabic script breathe.

motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Framer Motion: Fade in and subtle slide up (y: 10 -> 0) for smooth navigation between tabs.
motion_and_interaction.counter_tap: Framer Motion: whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }} for the Dhikr counter and Tasbih button.

icons_and_assets.instructions: Ensure icons are flipped if they possess directionality, though most bottom nav icons are symmetrical. Import icons dynamically.

geometric_background_day.description: Elegant gold and deep blue Islamic geometric pattern background, used for day mode splash/welcome screens.

geometric_background_night.description: Elegant gold and deep purple Islamic geometric pattern background, used for night mode splash/welcome screens.

digital_tasbih.description: Luxurious digital tasbih beads counter, 3D render, dark purple background, used as visual element in the tasbih section.

prophet_mosque.description: Prophet Mosque Madinah, used for the post-adhan dua popup.

prophet_mosque_alt.description: Alternative Prophet Mosque image with clock tower context.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Apply dir='rtl' to the root HTML or main wrapper to enforce Right-to-Left layout. Text alignment should inherently follow RTL.
Ensure Tailwind configuration includes the custom colors: #355070 for light/day theme background, and #2D2438 for dark/night theme background.
For the Arabic text, load Google Fonts 'Amiri' (for Dhikr text), 'Cairo' (for Headers), and 'Tajawal' (for UI body text). Extend tailwind config theme.fontFamily.
Since it's a mobile web app, restrict maximum width using 'max-w-md mx-auto' to simulate a mobile frame on desktop, keeping 'min-h-screen'.
Implement the Bottom Navigation cleanly with glassmorphism to not obstruct content but remain highly legible.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, navigation items, and interactive components like the Dhikr counter and audio controls.
